title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package to use Ollama models as LLMs or chat models in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, RAG, multi-user).

title: ollama-cli-copilot
summary: A CLI copilot powered by Ollama that suggests shell commands in your terminal.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented generation stack using Ollama, Chroma and LangChain.

title: ollama-vscode
summary: VS Code extension that adds Ollama chat and code-completion side-panel.

title: ollama-copilot.vim
summary: Vim plugin for code completion and explanation using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-npm (unofficial wrapper)
summary: Lightweight npm wrapper that downloads and manages the Ollama binary for CI/CD.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client for Ollama with Kotlin extensions and Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with integration for ASP.NET Core dependency injection.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Simple Slack bot using Bolt JS and Ollama to answer questions in channels or DMs.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds AI-assisted note completion and summarization via Ollama.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a service for CI pipelines (testing, benchmarks).

title: ollama-huggingface-hub
summary: Scripts to convert and upload Hugging Face models into Ollama Modelfile format.
